text.description: Message text. Slack-flavored markdown (italics via `_`, bold via `*`, code via backticks). MUST be present even when `blocks` is set — fallback when client can't render blocks.

blocks.description: Slack Block Kit blocks. Host forwards verbatim. Schema-shape is the Slack API's `blocks` argument.

threadTs.description: Parent message timestamp — when set, this message posts as a reply in the existing thread. Format: Slack message ts like `1715353200.123456`.

broadcast.description: Only used when threadTs is set. true = also broadcast the reply to the channel.
